opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and back are covered in these terrible white and brown splotches. They seemed to multiply in the sun, and I look diseased. I have a wedding this weekend.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Widespread white/brown patches on my trunk that got worse after a tropical holiday — very self-conscious before a wedding.

symptom_narrative.onset: patches present a while, dramatically worse after a hot/humid tropical holiday
symptom_narrative.character: well-defined white (and some brown/pink) patches, mostly not itchy, that don't tan
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very distressing appearance; mild itch at most
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper chest, back, neck and shoulders
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the white spots stand out against my tan; fine dust-like scale if I scratch/stretch the skin; no blisters
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: may have had milder patches before

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recent tropical holiday, hot/humid, lots of sweating

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants it gone before a wedding

objective_data_offered.value: lots of well-defined white patches (some pink/brown) on the upper chest, back and shoulders that stand out against tanned skin; a fine dust-like scale shows when the skin is stretched/scratched; no blisters or sores
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot do a Wood's lamp or microscopy
